items.summary: Implement persistent storage for admin users in the backend main actor, ensuring admin user data including principal and role are saved in stable variables that survive canister upgrades
Modify deleteMediaAsset function to check admin role from stored user data instead of using hardcoded principal comparison
Ensure the currently logged-in admin user has role 'admin' assigned in persistent storage and this role is verified before allowing delete operations
Preserve existing functionality for media listing and upload operations, ensuring they remain unaffected by authorization system changes
